name_en: Upgraded Version ⚠️ M40712 Blue Denim! The classic Monogram canvas is crafted into a lightweight, versatile handbag that can be carried by hand or crossbody. It is a classic style suitable for any occasion. The zippered design offers convenient use. Size: 21 x 13 x 3 cm.
